text:
Fix: 

It has error on making. 
	the problem is 
	"ln -s libtiff.so.4 libtiff"
	"File already exits."

	I think.. it has changed "ln -s ...." -> "ln -sf ....." on
        /usr/ports/graphics/tiff34/work/tiff34.../libtiff/Makefile

	It will be need a patch file.

	Have a nice day... bye.
